get.summary: Get settings by key (e.g. Fee, Payment)
Get list of references by name (e.g. feeType)
Get member summary (total paid, outstanding, overdue)
Lookup members - fuzzy search by first name, last name or ID

field.description: Field name that the message applies to

QuarterCellStatus.description: Payment status of a member for a specific quarter

QuarterStatus.description: The temporal status of a fiscal quarter
